text.title: vui-market-context Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the vui-market-context methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pull-2025-2026-data
step.action: Fetch IDC tracker + vendor SEC filings + dev-portal status pages.

step.name: score-platforms
step.action: Score each platform on install_base, developer_access, distribution_constraints. Cite 1+ source per score.

step.name: primary-fallback-recommendation
step.action: Pick primary + ≥1 fallback. Apply matter-or-ha-for-smart-home rule when use-case is smart-home.

step.name: lock-in-risk-notes
step.action: Document lock-in risk per chosen platform. Validate decision record.
